criteria.description: p95 dashboard TTI target on mobile 4G for power-user shape
criteria.pass_condition: p95 <= 1400ms over 50 samples using power-user fixture in staging

criteria.description: Dashboard data fetch error rate under load
criteria.pass_condition: error rate < 0.8% over 200 requests with power-user fixture and 4G throttling

criteria.description: No bundle size regression on dashboard route
criteria.pass_condition: gzipped dashboard chunk delta <= +4KB vs baseline (measured by build artifact diff)

criteria.description: Critical user path review on mobile
criteria.pass_condition: Signed off by mobile product reviewer with attached session recording showing load under power-user data

criteria.description: Existing dashboard e2e suite still green
criteria.pass_condition: All dashboard e2e tests pass in CI on the change branch
